docs.title: Star Org Labs
docs.text:
Run your Star Citizen org like a pro — from Discord to a full web command center. Events, fleet, loot, mining, and org ops in one connected system.

Open the app → Get started

docs.title: Why Star Org Labs?
docs.text:
Running an org is a second job — scheduling ops, chasing signups, tracking who actually showed, splitting loot fairly, keeping the fleet and treasury straight. Star Org Labs pulls all of it into one connected system so you spend less time on spreadsheets and more time flying.

  • Events & Operations

    Plan an op in minutes with a guided event wizard. Members sign up for roles and ships in Discord, you reuse templates for regular runs, track attendance & reliability over time, and settle the haul with the built-in Loot Hub.

  • Fleet & Hangar

    Every member gets a Personal Hangar to register their ships, and leadership gets an Org Fleet Dashboard to see exactly what the org can field.

  • Org Command

    A home base for leadership: member & server dashboards, personnel roster, org structure, a recruitment hub, support tickets, goals, guild points, treasury, and a public website CMS.

  • Industrial

    Tools for the working fleet: mining sessions, a cargo optimizer, the RSIG decoder, a rock calculator, and work orders.

  • Make it yours

    Theme the whole portal to your manufacturer of choice — Aegis, Drake, Origin, RSI, MISC, and more — or set an org-wide look for your members.

  • Lives in Discord

    Signups, reminders, and pings happen right where your members already are. Your leadership commands from the web; your members never leave chat.

docs.title: Ready to launch?
docs.text:
Getting started takes a few minutes and zero installs — sign in with Discord, add the bot, set up your org, and run your first op.

Get started Open the app

starorg.tools  ·  Join the Star Org Labs community

Star Org Labs is a community-built tool and is not affiliated with Cloud Imperium Games or Roberts Space Industries. Star Citizen® is a trademark of Cloud Imperium Rights LLC.

docs.title: Getting Started
docs.text: Get your org up and running in a few minutes — no installs, no spreadsheets.

docs.title: 1. Open the app & sign in
docs.text: Head to starorg.tools and sign in with Discord. Star Org Labs uses your Discord account, so there's nothing new to create.

docs.title: 2. Add the bot to your server
docs.text: In the app, use "Add to Server" and pick the Discord server you want to run your org from. You'll need permission to add a bot to that server.

docs.title: 3. Set up your org
docs.text:
From Server Settings, make it yours:

  • Drop in your org logo
  • Pick a theme — your manufacturer's colors, or a look of your own
  • Configure your channels so events and pings land in the right place

docs.title: 4. Run your first op
docs.text: Hit Create Event, build out the roster (roles, ships, teams), and share it. Your members sign up straight from Discord — and you track it all from the web. 🎉

docs.title: What's next?
docs.text:
Explore from the sidebar

  • Events & Ops — templates, recurring events, attendance, the Loot Hub
  • Org Command — roster, structure, recruitment, goals, treasury
  • Industrial — mining sessions, cargo optimizer, work orders

More detailed guides — bot commands, event planning, loot distribution — are on the way. Have a question in the meantime? Ask in the Star Org Labs community.
